diffs.diff:
--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -43,19 +43,24 @@
             out = model(batch.x, batch.edge_index, batch.edge_attr, batch.batch)

             ys.append(batch.y.view(-1, 128).cpu().numpy())

             ps.append(torch.sigmoid(out).cpu().numpy())

-    return compute_ap(np.concatenate(ys), np.concatenate(ps))

+    return compute_ap(np.concatenate(ys), np.concatenate(ps)), np.concatenate(ps), np.concatenate(ys)

 

 

 def main():

     ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

-    ap.add_argument('--epochs', type=int, default=60)

+    ap.add_argument('--epochs', type=int, default=100)

     ap.add_argument('--emb_dim', type=int, default=300)

     ap.add_argument('--num_layers', type=int, default=5)

     ap.add_argument('--batch_size', type=int, default=512)

     ap.add_argument('--lr', type=float, default=1e-3)

     ap.add_argument('--drop', type=float, default=0.5)

     ap.add_argument('--wd', type=float, default=0.0)

+    ap.add_argument('--seed', type=int, default=0)

+    ap.add_argument('--out', type=str, default='checkpoints/best.pt')

     args = ap.parse_args()

+

+    torch.manual_seed(args.seed)

+    np.random.seed(args.seed)

 

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     print('Loading data...', flush=True)

@@ -100,12 +105,12 @@
             if step % 200 == 0:

                 log_metric({'epoch': epoch, 'step': step, 'loss': loss.item()}, metrics_path)

         scheduler.step()

-        ap_score = evaluate(model, val_loader, device)

+        ap_score, _, _ = evaluate(model, val_loader, device)

         log_metric({'epoch': epoch, 'val_ap': ap_score, 'avg_loss': total_loss/n, 'time': time.time()-t0, 'lr': scheduler.get_last_lr()[0]}, metrics_path)

         print(f'Epoch {epoch}: loss={total_loss/n:.4f} val_ap={ap_score:.4f} time={time.time()-t0:.1f}s', flush=True)

         if ap_score > best_ap:

             best_ap = ap_score

-            torch.save({'model_state': model.state_dict(), 'args': vars(args)}, 'checkpoints/best.pt')

+            torch.save({'model_state': model.state_dict(), 'args': vars(args)}, args.out)

     print(f'Best val AP: {best_ap:.4f}', flush=True)
